description_long: This is a modern, rectangular cabinet featuring a geometric arrangement of drawers and open shelves. The front face displays a mix of wood-textured, light green, and light gray drawer fronts, interspersed with open cubby spaces in a dark gray finish. The cabinet stands on short, black legs, elevating it slightly above the ground. The sides and back are finished in a uniform gray, with no visible hardware or decorative elements. The overall design is minimalist and functional, suitable for urban interiors such as lobbies, offices, or apartment hallways. The varied drawer sizes and open compartments offer versatile storage options for everyday items.
description: A modern, multi-drawer cabinet with wood, green, and gray fronts, interspersed with open dark gray shelves. Minimalist design with short black legs and a clean, geometric look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full arrangement of drawers and open shelves in wood, green, and gray tones.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the cabinet's depth and the stacked arrangement of drawers, with minimal visible detail.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain, solid gray back panel with no visible features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the depth and side profile of the drawers.
